title: Simple Mines
description: mod that adds different interesting and usefull types of mines.
body:
This mod adds diffent types of mines and sapper tool to disarm them:

 

Anti-personnel landmine

![Landmine1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67a6374481c8e7e8d13009cf5280353e9356d083.png)

Simple mine, you need to right click on it to activate.

Explodes after you step off it. (Tints to biome and have sand variation)

 

 ![Thowing mine placed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4328c857d94057733599c34e83d8e0cce2ad0c1c.png)
 
![Throwing mine item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c44cd94d8d42a5b26a26969dd02e509e219fc2b6.png)

Landmine that you can throw somewhere and it will be planted and activated on location it landed.

Explodes when you step on it.


Sapper tool

![Sapper tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f01db8686f05d39252522d23f7d84adfe7c2933.png)

Tool you can use to disarm mines.


There will be many things added in future.

Join our Discord server
